# remnawave_node_plugin (Resource)

Manages a Remnawave node plugin.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Plugin name (2-30 chars).

### Optional

- `plugin_config` (String) Plugin config as JSON. Supported keys are sharedLists, torrentBlocker, ingressFilter, egressFilter, and connectionDrop.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String)
